name: pantheon
description: Multi-agent orchestration platform with 16 specialized agents, 27 skills, TDD enforcement, RAG pipelines, multi-model routing, conversational AI, observability, and multi-platform support (VS Code, OpenCode, Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf).

scripts.plugin:validate: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='.github/plugin/plugin.json'; if(!fs.existsSync(p)){throw new Error('Missing '+p);} JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8')); console.log('OK: '+p+' is valid JSON');"

author: ils15
